recommendations.title: Enhance BRSR and TCFD ESG Disclosures
recommendations.description: Accelerate and improve ESG disclosures under BRSR and TCFD frameworks to avoid SEBI scrutiny and potential trading restrictions, ensuring filings are complete by the FY26 deadline.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoids potential cost of capital increase by 20-40 bps on ₹63,000 Cr capex, saving ₹126-252 Cr annually
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power enhanced ESG disclosures leading to P/E rerating

recommendations.title: Implement Enhanced GRI Disclosure Practices
recommendations.description: Strengthen GRI reporting to improve ESG ratings and reduce risk of fund outflows by aligning disclosures with investor expectations.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved ESG ratings can prevent fund outflows estimated at ₹500 Cr annually

recommendations.title: Issue Green Bonds to Finance Assam Projects
recommendations.description: Raise ₹10,000 Cr through green bonds aligned with EU Taxonomy to lower cost of capital and signal ESG commitment, following Tata Power's successful ₹5,000 Cr green bond issuance.
recommendations.profitability_link: Expected 20 bps reduction in cost of capital on ₹10,000 Cr saves ₹20 Cr annually
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power's ₹5,000 Cr green bond issuance

recommendations.title: Develop Roadmap for Renewable Portfolio Increase
recommendations.description: Formulate a clear plan to increase renewable energy share towards 80% by 2030, including divestment of coal assets, to capture valuation premium and align with sector transition trends.
recommendations.profitability_link: Potential P/E rerating from 12x to 18x on ₹63,000 Cr asset base could increase valuation by ₹31,500 Cr over long term
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power committed to 80% renewables by 2030

immediate_high.title: Enhance BRSR and TCFD ESG Disclosures

immediate_low.title: Issue Green Bonds to Finance Assam Projects

deferred_high.title: Develop Roadmap for Renewable Portfolio Increase
